# PokéGuessr - Free Pokémon Guessing Game

## Overview
PokéGuessr is a free browser-based game where you identify Pokémon from their silhouettes. No account required, works on all devices.

## Key Features
- Identify Pokémon from silhouettes
- 1000+ Pokémon (Generations 1-9)
- Progressive clue system (4 levels of hints)
- Statistics tracking (win rate, streaks, games played)
- Fully responsive (mobile/desktop/tablet)
- Free and ad-supported
- Works offline after first load
- No download or registration needed

## Main Website
https://pokeguessr.com

## FAQ & Help
https://pokeguessr.com/faq

## How to Play
1. A Pokémon silhouette appears on screen
2. Type the Pokémon name in the search box
3. You get up to 5 incorrect guesses per round
4. Use hints strategically to narrow down your choices
5. Guess correctly to advance and build your streak
6. View your statistics automatically

## Game Rules
- 5 incorrect guesses per Pokémon = game over
- Correct guesses don't count against your limit
- Skip button available to move to next Pokémon
- Hints cost 1 attempt each (optional)
- Win streak resets on loss

## Generations Included
Pokémon from all 9 generations (1000+ total):
- Generation 1-2: Classic era
- Generation 3-5: Modern expansion
- Generation 6-9: Contemporary Pokémon

## Gameplay Modes
- Filter by single generation
- Mix all generations together
- View statistics and achievements

## Technology
Built with:
- Next.js 14 (React framework)
- TypeScript for type safety
- Tailwind CSS for responsive design
- PokéAPI for Pokémon data
- Framer Motion for smooth animations

## Browser Support
Works with all modern browsers:
- Chrome/Chromium-based browsers
- Firefox
- Safari
- Edge
- Brave, Vivaldi, and other Chromium variants

## Platform Support
- Desktop (Windows, Mac, Linux)
- Mobile (iOS, Android)
- Tablet (iPad, Android tablets)

## Data & Privacy
- Statistics saved locally in browser storage
- No personal data collected
- No account creation required
- Offline functionality available
- Clear cache option to reset statistics

## Contact & Support
For issues or feedback, visit the FAQ page or check GitHub repository.
